description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a textured grip pattern, suggesting ergonomic design for secure handling. The axe head is made of metal, with a broad, flat blade on one side and a squared poll on the opposite, suitable for both chopping and hammering tasks. The blade has a single cutting edge with a subtle beard, and the metal surface displays a hammered or forged texture, adding to its rugged appearance. The handle appears to be securely fitted into the axe head, likely using a traditional wedged mounting style. The overall finish of the axe is matte, with the wood showing a natural, dark-stained grain and the metal exhibiting a dull gray tone. No visible brand markings or labels are present on the axe.
description: A rugged hand axe with a curved, textured wooden handle and a broad, forged metal blade. The axe features a single cutting edge and a matte finish, with no visible brand markings.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the handle's alignment with the head.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the broad, textured metal blade and the curved, patterned wooden handle.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the bottom, emphasizing the slimness of the handle and the thickness of the head.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the blade's edge, the poll, and the ergonomic curve of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with textured grip, oval cross-section, ergonomic and dark-stained.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad metal blade with a subtle beard and squared poll, forged texture.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting, handle fitted through the axe head.
